trinity_of_doom.name: Trinity of Doom
trinity_of_doom.description:
[color=#FFFFFFAA][font_size=16]ALT NAME: Hell Trinity[/font_size][/color]
The most destructive enemies have come together to create an unstoppable force, perhaps you have become the hero this world needs.
(Bombers, Grenadiers, and Arsonists only.)

hard_mode.name: Hard Mode
hard_mode.description:
Looks like you're in for a hard time.
(Enemy HEALTH is multiplied by 1.25x, DAMAGE by 1.15x, and SPEED by 1.1x
Additionally, DIFFICULTY starts at 1 rather than 0, and increments by 0.25 rather than 0.1.)

juggernauts_reign_supreme.name: Juggernauts Reign Supreme
juggernauts_reign_supreme.description:
The Juggernauts now rule the world!.
(All enemies have the 1.5x HEALTH(except for Bombers who have 2.5x) and color of Juggernauts and DAMAGE is multiplied by 2.5x, actual Juggernauts become far more powerful and less common, there is also an Enemy Type indicator above Non-Juggernaut's Health Bar.)
When paired wtih any enemy limiting modifier, the Juggernaut will spawn alongside the limited enemies.

no_hit.name: No Hit
no_hit.description:
They say what doesn't kill you, only makes you stronger.
(You are locked with a MAX HEALTH of 1. Enemy SPEED, BULLET SPEED is halfed and FIRERATE is doubled (Slower) and Player SPEED is doubled. Additionally every level up your DAMAGE and SPEED increases and FIRERATE decreases (Faster).) Any Upgrade that modifies MAX HEALTH won't affect it.
[color=#FFFF00FF]Required Achievement: High Endurance[/color]

elementals.name: Elementals
elementals.description:
There exists 9 elements. but you'll only be facing against 5 for now.
(Arsonists, Thundermancers, Frostmancers, Throwers, and Slashers only.)
[color=#FFFF00FF]Required Achievements: Arsonist's Best Friend, Master Of Elements:Thunder, Ice Spikes, Polished Boulders, Stonecutter! (Air Edition)[/color]

tbd.name: To Be Decided
tbd.description: Yes this one is different from Elementals.
